UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, AFTER HEARING ARGUMENTS FROM BOTH PARTIES. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT DRAGAN PODLESNIK'S MOTION TO VACATE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 472 IS DENIED. DEFENDANT FAILED TO MEET HIS BURDEN UNDER CCP 473(B). ORDER SIGNED AND FILED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE LILIAN K. SING, CLERK B. PAREDES, NOT REPORTED. (501)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Default And Default Judgment Pursuant To Ccp 472
Off Calendar Mar-11-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Melvin Caesar Belli, Esq. The Belli Law Firm (415-981-1850)for Dragan Podlesnik defendant and moving party.
Joanna Kozubal, Esq. attorney at law (415-864-6962) for Jennifer Kirkley plaintiff and opposing party.

After hearing arguments from both parties. The Court Adopts the Tentative ruling as follows:
DEFENDANT DRAGAN PODLESNIK's Motion To Vacate Default And Default Judgment Pursuant To Ccp 472 is DENIED. Defendant failed to meet his burden under CCP 473(b). Order signed and filed in open court. Judge Lilian K. Sing, Clerk B. Paredes, Not Reported. (501)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-27-2014 Vacated

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Vacate Default And Default Judgment Pursuant To Ccp 473
Off Calendar Feb-14-2014 Off Calendar

Prove-Up Hearing Brief
Off Calendar Dec-26-2013 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar Dec-26-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: John Dearman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, Proceedings reported by: Angie Diner, CSR 581. Telephone # 415 551 3775. (514)

Joanna Kozubal, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Jennifer Jan Kirkley.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Dragan Podlesnik.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

Plaintiff Jennifer Jan Kirkley sworn and examinded on her own behalf.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

The lease for the premises located at 33 Santa Paula Avenue, San Francisco, CA 94127 (hereafter "Property") executed between previous owner of the Property, Zeljko Markovic and Defendant Dragan Podlesnik ar recorded in San Francisco Reocrder's Office as document No. 2012-J537912 is declared fraudulent and as such it is declared void and invalid.
Plaintiff was deprived of the use of the property from November 9,2012, which is the date she pruchased the Property until the date of the Judgment, December 26, 2013. (412 day) at the rate of $173.33 per day for the total amount of $71,411.96. Plaintiff is awarded $71,411.96 in actual damated. Plaintiff is awarded her costs of suit in the amount of $805.00, for a total monetary judgment of $72,216.96
Judgment signed in open court.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Terminating Sanctions For Failure To Obey Court Order
Off Calendar Oct-16-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:Attorney Joanna Kozubal for PLAINTIFF JENNIFER KIRKLEY, moving party is present.

PLAINTIFF JENNIFER KIRKLEY's Motion For Terminating Sanctions For Failure To Obey Court Order
is GRANTED, no opposition filed. Dragan Podlesnik's Answer to complaint is stricken. Plaintiff's counsel presents order in accordance with tentative ruling, signed in open court. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported. (501)

Ntc Of Motion To Compel Discovery
Off Calendar Aug-27-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Atty. Joanna Kozubal (415-864-6962) appearing for Plaintiff and moving party/ No other apperances.

Tentative ruling adopted as follows: Plaintiff's Motion to Compel Discovery is GRANTED. Plaintiff's Requests for Admissions are Deemed Admitted. Defendant shall provide responses to Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories and Request for Production within 10 days of notice of entry of this order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $810. No opposition filed. Order for the same signed in open court. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk N. Bautista, Not Reported, (501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-01-2013 Set For Trial On Mar-03-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
